zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth於大約1118年出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，他的父親William Merlay40歲，母親Menialda de Morwick30歲。他和Juliana de Dunbar至少有4個兒子。他於1138年在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比被列為founder of newminster abbey。他去世於1157年之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth于大约1118年出生在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯时，他的父亲William Merlay40岁，母亲Menialda de Morwick30岁。他和Juliana de Dunbar至少有4个儿子。他于1138年在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比被列为founder of newminster abbey。他去世于1157年之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Merlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth was born about 1118, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, his father, William Merlay, was 40 and his mother, Menialda de Morwick, was 30. He had at least 4 sons with Juliana de Dunbar. In 1138, at the age of 21, his occupation is listed as founder of newminster abbey in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England. He died before 1157, in his hometown, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth est né environ 1118, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Merlay, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Menialda de Morwick, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Juliana de Dunbar. En 1138, à l’âge de 21 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est founder of newminster abbey à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 1157, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth um 1118 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Merlay 40 und seine Mutter Menialda de Morwick 30. Er hatte mit Juliana de Dunbar mindestens 4 Söhne. 1138, als er 21 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als founder of newminster abbey in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1157 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth è nato il circa 1118 nel Morpeth, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William Merlay, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Menialda de Morwick, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Juliana de Dunbar. Nel 1138, all'età di 21 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come founder of newminster abbey nel Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England. Morì prima del 1157, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビー
ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpethが約1118年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで生まれた時，父William Merlayは40歳，母Menialda de Morwickは30歳であった。彼はJuliana de Dunbarとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。1138年，21歳の時，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーでの職業はfounder of newminster abbeyと記録されている。彼は1157年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth(이)가 대략 1118년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Merlay(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Menialda de Morwick(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Juliana de Dunbar(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1138년, 21세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에서 founder of newminster abbey이었다. 그는 1157년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Merlay, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Menialda de Morwick, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Juliana de Dunbar. Em 1138, com 21 anos, sua profissão aparece como founder of newminster abbey em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 1157, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth родился около 1118 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Merlay было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Menialda de Morwick, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Juliana de Dunbar. В 1138 году, в возрасте 21 год,  он работал по профессии founder of newminster abbey в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия. Он умер перед 1157 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth nació aproximadamente 1118, en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Merlay, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Menialda de Morwick, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Juliana de Dunbar. En 1138, a la edad de 21 años, su ocupación registrada era founder of newminster abbey en Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 1157, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
